notes: Political news case where strict path blew up and fallback salvaged a usable bias/article-type read, but several dimensions stayed provider-missing.

article.title: «Cuál ha sido su prioridad?» y «¿cuánto cuesta su gobierno?» Así despedirá el PP a Montero

parsed_json.rationale: ABC, a center-right outlet, frames this parliamentary coverage around PP opposition questions to the government. The headline directly quotes PP criticisms of Montero. While the article includes questions from Podemos and Bildu for apparent balance, the framing and emphasis favor PP's interrogative approach, highlighting budget failures, ethics concerns, and government costs.
